command:
./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import yaml
c=yaml.safe_load(open('examples/multi-validator-contract/contract.yaml',encoding='utf-8'))
ab=c.get('ai_behavior_override')
assert ab==['AGENTS.md'] or ab=='AGENTS.md' or (isinstance(ab,list) and 'AGENTS.md' in ab), ab
t=open('examples/multi-validator-contract/AGENTS.md',encoding='utf-8').read()
assert len(t.splitlines())==9 and 'AI Behavior Overrides' in t
print('contract.yaml ai_behavior_override points at AGENTS.md; exemplar is 9 lines with override header')
"
